title: Stream House: Going Private
summary: Hired to manage a chaotic mansion full of beautiful but eccentric streamers, you must balance the logistics of a high-tech household with the complex emotional and physical needs of your talent to keep the content—and the romance—flowing.
plot_outline: The protagonist accepts a high-paying job to manage 'The Stream House,' a mansion housing various content creators. The game begins immediately upon entering the front door, where the player meets Anya, the unwashed, autistic tech gremlin responsible for the house's IT infrastructure. The player must navigate the mansion, upgrade equipment, resolve conflicts between the different streamer archetypes, and use their management skills—and charm—to keep the residents happy and satisfied in any way possible.
